q: It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the ZF =0.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the CF or ZF =0.
It is a flag instruction that complements the value of the carry flag.
It is an instruction in assembly language which is same as JMP instruction but JMP is only taken if the condition is TRUE.
It is the register used to indicate the number of loops in assembly language.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the CF is 1.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the SF=OF.
It is a control transfer instructions that unconditionally transfers control to the target location.

What is the content of the destination operand and the condition of the status flags after executing the following instructions.
MOV AH,ABH
SAHF
opts: ah=ab; sf=1; zf=0; af=0; pf=1; cf=1; of=0
ah = ab sf = 1 ; zf = 0 ; af = 0 pf = 0 cf = 0 of=0
ah = ab sf = 1 ; zf = 0 af = 0 pf = O cf = 1 ; of = 0
ah = ab sf = 1 zf = 0 ; af = 0 pf=0; cf = 1 ; of = 1
a: ah = ab sf = 1 ; zf = 0 af = 0 pf = O cf = 1 ; of = 0

q: is the content of the destination operand and the condition of the status flags after executing LAHF instruction assuming the value of the flags SF = 1 , ZF = 1 , AF = 0 PF = 1 CF = 0
opts: ah =c4 sf = 1 zf = 1 ; af = 0; pf = 1 cf = 0 of = 1
ah =c4 sf = 1 ; zf = 1 ; af = 0 ; pf = 1 cf = 1 of = 0

ah =c4; sf = 1; 0; zf = 1;  af = O; pf=1; cf=0; of = O
a: ah =c4; sf = 1; 0; zf = 1;  af = O; pf=1; cf=0; of = O

q: It is an instruction in assembly language that allows the programmer to skip sections of a program and branch to any part of the memory for the next instruction.
It is a flag instruction that pushes the status register onto the stack.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the SF not equal to OF.
It is a control transfer instructions that may or may not transfer control depending on the state of the status flags at the time the instruction is executed.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the ZF =1 or SF not equal to OF.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the CF=1.
The Jcc (Unconditional Jump) instruction unconditionally transfers control to the target location.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the CF is 0.
The Jcc (Conditional Jump) instructions are jumps that may or may not transfer control depending on the state of the status flags at the time the instruction is executed.
The JMP (Conditional Jump) instructions are jumps that may or may not transfer control depending on the state of the status flags at the time the instruction is executed.
It is a flag instruction that transfers the content AH to flags on its respective bits.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the ZF =1.
It is a control transfer instructions that jumps if the value of the CF or ZF =1.
It is an instruction in assembly language that is used to compare two numeric data fields, one or both of which are contained in a register

MOV AH,ABH
SAHF
